summary: Implemented issue #246 by adopting lightweight Claude Agent SDK loop practices that fit the current SpecBridge runtime. Bounded local MCP tools now advertise annotations.readOnlyHint true, the CLI regression suite fails if an allowlisted bounded tool misses that metadata, CLAUDE.md now preserves governed task evidence during compaction, and token/context plus MCP documentation record the adopted practices and blocked future SDK runtime boundaries.
validations: claude -p issue-246 bounded implementation audit: passed
GitHub Actions: pending until PR publication
policy_result: Within policy. The implementation only adds local read-only MCP metadata, regression coverage, and documentation. It does not install dependencies, import or host the Agent SDK, implement hooks, persist SDK sessions, add network MCP transport, add mutation-capable MCP tools, mutate GitHub through MCP, access secrets, configure billing, change production, implement auth, change databases, change CI/CD security, enforce cleanup, or deploy.
risk_result: Low risk and contained. The change narrows ambiguity around existing read-only tools and context preservation without expanding runtime authority.
unresolved_risks: Hosted Agent SDK runtime, hooks, session resume or fork, structured output retries, telemetry, network MCP transport, and mutation-capable tools remain blocked future work requiring dedicated contracts.
GitHub Actions evidence is pending until the PR is opened.
merge_status: Not merged yet. Merge is allowed only after required local validations, GitHub Actions, review gate, policy gate, and no protected-file changes pass.
deployment_status: Not applicable. No deployment is allowed by this contract.
